member.name: T:Origam.DA.Common.Strings
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.CantBeEmpty
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} cannot be empty.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.CantBeNull
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} cannot be empty..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.ChildErrors
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Child records contain errors..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.CopyPrefix
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Copy - .

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.ErrorWhileReading
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Error occured while reading file {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.ErrorWhileWriting
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Error in writing file {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.FileTooBig
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to File is too big to store, can't store files larger than {0} bytes..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.FillPlease
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Please enter {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.IdentifierMaxLength
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Length limit exceeded. Max {0} entity name length is {1} characters..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.IndexMaxLength
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Index name in database is composed of entity and index name. The final index name {0} exceeds max {1} identifier length of {2} characters..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.InvalidNumberKeys
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid number of keys in the primary key of this object.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.MappedColumnNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Mapped column not found in the data source. Cannot map to the parameter '{0}'..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.MemberNameRequired
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Member name cannot be empty..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.NoKeyInPrimaryKey
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Primary key does not contain key '{0}'.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.NoRowsInTable
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to No rows exist in table '{0}'. Cannot get parameter..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.OnlyDatetimeSupported
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Only DateTime or NULL value is supported..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.PartialRollbackNotSupported
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Partial rollback of transaction is not supported by {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.PostgresIndexNameLength
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Be careful, index names must be unique within schema in Postgre SQL..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.RelationNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Relation '{0}' not found while fetching parent record for parameter mapping..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.SavingNotSupported
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Saving of transaction is not supported by {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Common.Strings.TableNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Table not found: {0}.

member.summary: Represents a strongly typed in-memory cache of data.

member.summary: Represents the strongly named DataTable class.

member.summary: Represents strongly named DataRow class.

member.name: T:Origam.DA.DataAuditLog.AuditRecordRowChangeEvent
member.summary: Row event argument class

member.name: T:Origam.DA.DataMergeChange
member.summary: Summary description for DataMergeChange.

member.name: T:Origam.DA.DataStructureQuery
member.summary: This class is used to reference data structure with filters when asking IDataService for data.

member.summary: Summary description for Debug.

member.name: T:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.ICompiledModel
member.summary: Summary description for ICompiledModel.

member.name: T:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.IPersistenceProvider
member.summary: Summary description for IPersistenceProvider.

member.name: M:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.IPersistenceProvider.RetrieveInstance(System.Type,Origam.Key)
member.summary: Insert or update the current object instance.

member.name: M:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.IPersistenceProvider.RetrieveInstance(System.Type,Origam.Key,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Insert or update the current object instance.

member.name: M:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.IPersistenceProvider.RefreshInstance(Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.IPersistent)
member.summary: Refreshes the current object with data from the dataset.

member.name: M:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.IPersistenceProvider.RemoveFromCache(Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.IPersistent)
member.summary: Removes the item from the internal cache.

member.name: M:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.IPersistenceProvider.RetrieveList``1(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Retrieves a list of objects by specified filter. It does not load data from database, just from the initialized data, loaded by Init() before.

member.name: M:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.IPersistenceProvider.Persist(Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.IPersistent)
member.summary: Persist (inserts or updates) an object.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.IPersistent.PrimaryKey
member.summary: Gets primary key of the object.

member.name: M:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.IPersistent.Persist
member.summary: Insert or update the current object instance.

member.name: M:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.IPersistent.Refresh
member.summary: Select the current object instance and initialize all properties/fields with the values of the retrieved data. This method can be used in place of static constructors in implementations of IPersistant as it allows constructors to merely take a Key parameter (and then call this method to initialize all fields).

member.name: M:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.IPersistent.GetFreshItem
member.summary: Returns freshly retrieved copy from the persistence provider keeping the existing one as it is.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.IPersistent.IsDeleted
member.summary: True if the object is supposed to be deleted from the database whe Persist() is called. Note: This does not destroy or invalidate the current object instance.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.IPersistent.IsPersisted
member.summary: True if the current instance has been persisted to the database.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.IPersistent.UseObjectCache
member.summary: True if persistence provider's object cache can be used with this object.

member.name: T:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.IProviderContainer
member.summary: All persistable items implement this interface.

member.name: T:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.AbstractPersistent
member.summary: Abstract class the developer can implement to save time on developing persistent classes. The final class must have a constructor with (Key) parameter, that has to call the same abstract constructor here. The final call also has to add the right keys to the collection (in its default constructor).

member.name: M:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.AbstractPersistent.#ctor(Origam.Key,System.Array)
member.summary: This constructor assigns a primary key and checks if this primary key is valid in the object that inherits this class.
member.param: Primary key assigned to this object
String array of column names composing the correct primary key

member.name: T:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.AbstractModelElementRuleAttribute
member.summary: Summary description for AbstractModelElementRuleAttribute.

member.name: T:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.NotNullModelElementRuleAttribute
member.summary: Summary description for NotNullModelElementRuleAttribute.

member.name: M:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.NotNullModelElementRuleAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Will raise an exception when conditionField is not empty and the checked field is empty.
member.param: Field that will be checked. If empty, no checking will be done. If this field is filled, the checked field will be checked if it is empty.

member.name: T:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.StringNotEmptyModelElementRuleAttribute
member.summary: Summary description for NotNullModelElementRuleAttribute.

member.name: T:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.ExternalFileExtension
member.summary: Edit IsSearchable if you want your newly defined ExternalFileExtension to be marked as searchable.

member.name: T:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.XmlParentAttribute
member.summary: Use this attribute to identify a Guid type field which stores a reference to a parent object. This value will not be serialized to the model storage but when retrieving it will be passed from a parent object.

member.name: M:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.XmlParentAttribute.#ctor(System.Type)
member.summary: The constructor for the XmlParent attribute.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.XmlParentAttribute.Type
member.summary: The type referenced.

member.name: T:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.XmlReferenceAttribute
member.summary: Use this attribute to identify a Guid type field which stores a reference to a parent object. This value will not be serialized to the model storage but when retrieving it will be passed from a parent object.

member.name: M:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.XmlReferenceAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: The constructor for the XmlParent attribute.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.XmlReferenceAttribute.IdField
member.summary: Field which contains a referenced object's id

member.name: T:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.PropertyContainer`1
member.summary: This class holds the information whether or not the property it represents was set to null by the user and combines it with lazy loading. If it was set to null by the user the Get method will return null, if not the actual value is retrieved.

member.summary: Gets or sets name of the parameter we will be setting on the query.

member.summary: Gets or sets value of the parameter.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.QueryParameterCollection.Item(System.Int32)

summary.para: Represents the entry at the specified index of the .

param.name: index
param.para: The zero-based index of the entry to locate in the collection.

value.para: The entry at the specified index of the collection.

member.exception: is outside the valid range of indexes for the collection.

summary.para: Adds a with the specified value to the .

returns.para: The index at which the new element was inserted.

summary.para: Copies the elements of an array to the end of the .

summary.para: Adds the contents of another to the end of the collection.

member.param: A containing the objects to add to the collection.

summary.para: Gets a value indicating whether the contains the specified .

returns.para: if the is contained in the collection; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Origam.DA.QueryParameterCollection.CopyTo(Origam.DA.QueryParameter[],System.Int32)

summary.para: Copies the values to a one-dimensional instance at the specified index.

param.name: array
param.para: The one-dimensional that is the destination of the values copied from .

member.param: The index in where copying begins.

exception.para: The number of elements in the is greater than the available space between and the end of .

summary.para: Returns the index of a in the .

returns.para: The index of the of in the , if found; otherwise, -1.

summary.para: Inserts a into the at the specified index.
